title: SpaceX plummets after lockup period ends and loses a trillion dollars in value
summary: The space company's shares fall below their IPO price, dragged down by the expiration of locked-up shares.

title: European stock exchanges close mixed as Ibex 35 surpasses 19,300 points
summary: The session in Europe showed contradictory results with the German Dax pressured by tech stocks and the Spanish market supported by banking.

title: Wall Street falls weighed down by the collapse of tech stocks and doubts about artificial intelligence
summary: U.S. indices closed in the red with the Nasdaq leading losses amid caution over high sector valuations.

title: Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz raise the risk of a severe oil supply crisis
summary: The Iranian blockade and U.S. retaliation lead traders to warn that the market is about to run out of fuel.

title: Doubts about the future of artificial intelligence shake global stock markets
summary: Fears of a slowdown in AI spending and mixed corporate results generate a wave of selling in the global tech sector.

title: Sharp correction in semiconductor stocks on fears of overcapacity
summary: Shares of chipmakers such as Intel and Micron lead declines as the market debates the end of the memory supercycle.

title: U.S. inflation and retail sales data offer contradictory signals about the economy
summary: The moderation of inflation contrasts with modest retail sales growth in June, keeping uncertainty about the Fed's path.

title: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC) achieves record quarterly revenue driven by AI
summary: The company reported $40.2 billion in revenue, 36% more than last year, consolidating its leadership in advanced chip manufacturing.

title: Digi sinks in its stock market debut in Spain despite a promising start
summary: The telecom operator closed its first day of trading with an 8% drop after Barclays downgraded its rival Telefónica.

title: Citadel Securities invests $400 million in Crypto.com at a valuation of $20 billion
summary: The trading firm led by Ken Griffin becomes a strategic investor in the cryptocurrency exchange, marking a milestone in sector funding.

title: CFTC investigates Trump's teleprompter operator for insider trading in bets
summary: The commodities regulator examines whether the employee made political bets based on confidential information obtained during the election campaign.

title: Fed suggests interest rates need to be 'slightly higher' to curb inflation
summary: Dallas Fed President Lorie Logan tightened monetary rhetoric, generating additional pressure on equity markets.

title: The rise of artificial intelligence drives a wave of IPOs in the energy sector
summary: Energy companies that power data centers benefit from investor demand seeking indirect exposure to AI growth.

title: CoreWeave plummets as New York freezes permits for AI data centers
summary: The drastic 50% drop of the cloud computing company reflects the impact of regulatory measures on AI energy infrastructure.

title: European regulators impose tough penalties for audit failures and the Cum-Ex tax scandal
summary: PwC is fined for its work on Babcock International while a former Macquarie banker avoids jail for his involvement in the dividend scheme.

title: Alphabet faces delays in its Gemini AI and an EU order to share search data
summary: Google shares fall due to the delay of its flagship model while Brussels forces it to open its data to competitor companies.

title: SanDisk, Corning and Goldman Sachs lead losses in the S&P 500 and Dow Jones sectors
summary: Daily market movements showed sharp declines in the semiconductor and financial sectors, while Abbott and Merck stood out on the upside.

title: The Ibex 35 shows structural strength that invites optimism without falling into the tech bubble
summary: Analysts highlight low exposure to pure technology as an advantage for the Spanish market, which could reach 20,000 points.

title: Trump pressures the arms industry and shortens the duration of study and press visas
summary: Trump administration announces new measures on defense and immigration that affect both weapons manufacturers and foreign residents.

title: Global tension grows with attacks on Ukrainian wheat and Chinese warships near Japan
summary: Diplomatic efforts become complicated as Greece vetoes anti-Russian sanctions and the Chinese Navy deploys off the coast of Okinawa.
